headline: Morgan Stanley and Bank of American Wealth Units Bring in Billions of New Money
summary: Bank of America’s wealth unit, which includes a private bank and Merrill, reported asset flows of $20 billion for the quarter.  For the year-ago period, Morgan Stanley hauled in $93.8 billion.  Managing money on behalf of affluent investors has become a big business for banks, which prize the steady revenues wealth management can generate.

headline: Morgan Stanley’s (NYSE:MS) Q1 CY2026: Strong Sales
summary: Global financial services firm Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 16% year on year to $20.58 billion. Its GAAP profit of $3.43 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Morgan Stanley Investment Banking, Wealth Management Deliver Record Quarter
summary: Morgan Stanley said its institutional securities and wealth management units delivered record net revenue for the first quarter of $10.7 billion and $8.5 billion, respectively.  Morgan Stanley reported net new assets of $118 billion for the quarter, up from $93.8 billion for the same period last year.  Daily average revenue trades, a brokerage industry metric for investor activity, were 1.1 million for the quarter compared to 1 million for the year-ago period.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Investment Banking, Wealth Management Deliver Record Quarter
content.summary: Morgan Stanley said its institutional securities and wealth management units delivered record net revenue for the first quarter of $10.7 billion and $8.5 billion, respectively.  Morgan Stanley reported net new assets of $118 billion for the quarter, up from $93.8 billion for the same period last year.  Daily average revenue trades, a brokerage industry metric for investor activity, were 1.1 million for the quarter compared to 1 million for the year-ago period.

headline: Morgan Stanley Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
summary: NEW YORK, April 15, 2026--Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are now available on the Firm’s Investor Relations website at www.morganstanley.com/about-us-ir/earnings-releases. The results will be filed on a Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on April 15, 2026, which will be available on the SEC’s website at www.sec.gov.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Reports First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
content.summary: NEW YORK, April 15, 2026--Morgan Stanley (NYSE: MS) today announced its first quarter 2026 financial results. The results are now available on the Firm’s Investor Relations website at www.morganstanley.com/about-us-ir/earnings-releases. The results will be filed on a Form 8-K with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on April 15, 2026, which will be available on the SEC’s website at www.sec.gov.

headline: Hedge Funds Pivot to Bearish Dollar Bets on US-Iran Talks Optimism
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Hedge funds are increasingly downbeat on the dollar as the prospect of renewed US-Iran talks and a possible peace deal sap the currency’s war-driven strength. Investors added to their bearish dollar trades this month through April 10, based on a proprietary trading model from Morgan Stanley.In the options market, so-called risk reversals on the Bloomberg dollar index show the premium to hedge against a stronger dollar compared with bets against a weaker greenback has narrowed this

headline: Pimco Buys All $400 Million of Bonds Sold by Blue Owl BDC
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Pacific Investment Management Co. bought all $400 million of bonds issued Monday by a Blue Owl Capital Inc. private credit fund, according to people with knowledge of the matter.The purchase comes amid a selloff that’s pushed spreads on notes from similar funds to multiyear highs in recent weeks, fueled in part by concerns over lending standards and exposure to software companies vulnerable to disruption from AI. headline: BofA's trading desk avoided a single daily loss in Q1 amid market turmoil
summary: The market volatility of the last three months, caused partly by the war in Iran, has been a boon to Wall Street, as another set of banks reported strong profits helped by wild swings in markets and companies looking to make deals while the economy remains resilient.  Bank of America said on Wednesday that first-quarter stock trading revenues were $2.8 billion, a 30% jump from last year, while Morgan Stanley's much larger trading desk saw its equity trading revenues rise 25% to $5.15 billion.  Morgan Stanley also had a very strong performance on its bond-trading desk, posting a 29% jump in revenues to $3.36 billion.

content.title: BofA's trading desk avoided a single daily loss in Q1 amid market turmoil
content.summary: The market volatility of the last three months, caused partly by the war in Iran, has been a boon to Wall Street, as another set of banks reported strong profits helped by wild swings in markets and companies looking to make deals while the economy remains resilient.  Bank of America said on Wednesday that first-quarter stock trading revenues were $2.8 billion, a 30% jump from last year, while Morgan Stanley's much larger trading desk saw its equity trading revenues rise 25% to $5.15 billion.  Morgan Stanley also had a very strong performance on its bond-trading desk, posting a 29% jump in revenues to $3.36 billion.

headline: ‘AI Is Our Friend,’ Morgan Stanley CEO Says
summary: “It’s just the latest generation of technology that will be part of the ecosystem.”  Pick anticipates that it will move beyond routine tasks to become more of a copilot, operating alongside Morgan Stanley financial advisors and other employees.  In February, wealth management stocks, such as Charles Schwab and Raymond James Financial, sold off on news that fintech Altruist had added tax planning capabilities to its AI platform for advisors, called Hazel.

headline: Morgan Stanley’s Client Referral Engine is Humming Along, CFO Says
summary: Morgan Stanley’s workplace business is referring a steady stream of clients to the company’s financial advisors, CFO Sharon Yeshaya said during the company’s earnings call on Wednesday morning.  The workplace business provides stock plan administration and related services to corporate clients.  When an executive at a corporate client has stock options that are vesting, the executive may want financial advice for how to manage that money.

headline: Five Things We Learned From Bank Earnings
summary: The nation’s biggest banks this week painted a reassuring picture of the U.S. economy, saying consumers are still spending despite surging gas prices since the Iran war began.  Trading desks are raking in money from volatile markets and dealmakers are busier than they have been in a while.

content.title: Five Things We Learned From Bank Earnings
content.summary: The nation’s biggest banks this week painted a reassuring picture of the U.S. economy, saying consumers are still spending despite surging gas prices since the Iran war began.  Trading desks are raking in money from volatile markets and dealmakers are busier than they have been in a while.

headline: Morgan Stanley Shares Pace for Record High After Earnings Beat Estimates
summary: Morgan Stanley’s stock rose 4.5% on Wednesday and was on track for a record close after the firm reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings. The New York-based bank said Wednesday that its institutional securities and wealth management businesses drove record net revenues for the first quarter.

content.title: Morgan Stanley Shares Pace for Record High After Earnings Beat Estimates
content.summary: Morgan Stanley’s stock rose 4.5% on Wednesday and was on track for a record close after the firm reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings. The New York-based bank said Wednesday that its institutional securities and wealth management businesses drove record net revenues for the first quarter.

headline: US Stocks Close at Record Highs on Peace Hopes: Markets Wrap
summary: (Bloomberg) -- US stocks closed at record highs on Wednesday, as a potential peace deal in the Middle East and a strong start to corporate earnings season stoked investor optimism. The S&P 500 finished the day up 0.8%, extending a dramatic two-week surge from its late March lows. The tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 was up 1.4%, also a record. Bank of America Corp. and Morgan Stanley rose as their equity traders posted strong revenue beats. Hopes that peace efforts between the US and Iran will succeed have

headline: Morgan Stanley Coverage Casts Donlin Gold Progress In Long Term Focus
summary: Morgan Stanley has initiated coverage on NovaGold Resources (TSX:NG), focusing on the Donlin Gold project. The firm highlights recent progress in engineering, permitting, and stakeholder engagement. The coverage centers on the long-term development potential of Donlin Gold rather than near term earnings. NovaGold Resources, through its interest in the Donlin Gold project in Alaska, is tied to a large scale gold development concept that sits outside the typical producing miner group. Morgan...

headline: SpaceX Plans Site Visits for Large Investors as Mega-IPO Nears
summary: (Bloomberg) -- SpaceX is gearing up to take potential anchor investors in its IPO on a tour of its marquee sites across America, people familiar with the plans said, as billionaire Elon Musk’s company targets the biggest ever market debut.The rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence company is looking to showcase facilities in California and Texas over a few days in visits for investors who could take large stakes in the offering, such as sovereign wealth funds, according to the people.Spac

headline: Bank Stocks Stage Comeback as Morgan Stanley, Bank of America Rise
summary: The State Street SPDR S&P Bank exchange-traded fund, which tracks large lenders, traded at session highs on Wednesday afternoon after a fresh round of big banks’ quarterly earnings.  Shares of Morgan Stanley surged 4.4% after the bank reported first-quarter earnings that topped Wall Street’s expectations.  Bank of America, which also released better-than-expected earnings on Wednesday, rose 1.8%.

content.title: Bank Stocks Stage Comeback as Morgan Stanley, Bank of America Rise

Bank of America, which also released better-than-expected earnings on Wednesday, rose 1.8%.
